message:
Improve warnings package test coverage (49.4% → 92.1%)

Add comprehensive tests for:
- NewChecker: initialization with dependencies, default thresholds
- CheckAll: empty vault, expired tokens, expiring tokens, warning threshold,
  healthy tokens, codex profiles, multiple profiles
- CheckActive: empty vault, no active profiles
- checkVaultProfile: invalid expiry, missing expiry
- Print: info level color, warning level color, no action display
- Filter: empty warnings, all filtered
- Custom thresholds configuration

Improved function coverage:
- NewChecker: 0% → 100%
- CheckAll: 0% → 88.9%
- CheckActive: 0% → 75.0%
- checkVaultProfile: 0% → 89.5%

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
